PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?group ?groupLabel(SUM(?sales) AS ?totalSales) WHERE {
  ?group rdfs:label ?groupLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?groupLabel) = "en")
  FILTER REGEX(?groupLabel , "girl|girls" , "i")
  .
  ?album wdt:P175 ?group .
  ?album wdt:P2664 ?sales .
}
GROUP BY ?group ?groupLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalSales)
LIMIT 1
